=== Quick Fix Inventory ===

[D1] (7:40-7:79) TS377082: This `Effect.sync` thunk returns a Promise. Use `Effect.promise` or `Effect.tryPromise` to represent async work. effect(lazyPromiseInEffectSync)
  Fix 0: "Disable lazyPromiseInEffectSync for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable lazyPromiseInEffectSync for entire file"

[D2] (7:46-7:51) TS377063: This Effect code calls the global `fetch` function, HTTP requests in Effect code are represented through `HttpClient` from `@effect/platform`. effect(globalFetchInEffect)
  Fix 0: "Disable globalFetchInEffect for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable globalFetchInEffect for entire file"

  Fix 0: "Disable globalFetchInEffect for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable globalFetchInEffect for entire file"

  Fix 0: "Disable globalFetchInEffect for this line"
  Fix 1: "Disable globalFetchInEffect for entire file"

  Fix 0: "Disable globalFetchInEffect for this line"
